title: Croparia+
description: A Croparia addon that adds more stuff.
body:
![Croparia+](https://imgur.com/fzPzkev.png)

Croparia+ is an addon of Croparia and Soularia.

This mod adds colorfull and customizable blocks such as greenhouses and jars. Also an obsidian stuff and a renforced stuff.
 

You can combine any type of planks, glasses and lights !

 
Multitools : self explained

Knives : use it to harvest crop
